payload.description:
## Problem
Procedures dashboard loading state has poor visual quality in dark mode (bright/light flashes) and blocks too long before showing procedure cards.

## Required Changes
- Replace inline procedure skeleton placeholders with a themed, dark-mode-safe shared skeleton component
- Refactor procedures loading to progressive phases so cards render before task hydration completes
- Keep existing list visible during refresh/hydration and surface non-blocking errors
- Add tests covering initial skeleton, progressive render, and hydration behavior

## Constraints
- No backend/schema changes
- Dashboard-only implementation in existing React/Next.js app
payload.title: Improve procedures dashboard loading skeleton and progressive render
